name: Oshkosh Corporation
description: Oshkosh Corporation is a leading industrial company that designs, develops, and manufactures a wide range of purpose-built vehicles and equipment. Headquartered in Oshkosh, Wisconsin, the company serves various sectors, including defense, fire and emergency, construction, and refuse collection. With a history dating back to 1917, Oshkosh is renowned for producing some of the industry's toughest specialty trucks and access equipment. The company operates globally, focusing on building, protecting, and serving communities through innovative engineering solutions and a commitment to high-performance machinery that meets the demanding needs of its diverse customer base.
